hero.headline: Secure, Fast VPN Management
hero.subheadline: Professional VPN panel for service operators. Manage nodes, users, and subscriptions from one dashboard.
features.title: Everything You Need to Run a VPN Business
features.subtitle: A complete toolkit for VPN service operators — from provisioning to billing.
features.0.title: Multi-Protocol VPN
features.0.desc: OpenVPN, WireGuard, IKEv2, L2TP — all managed from one dashboard.
features.1.title: Real-Time Node Monitoring
features.1.desc: Live bandwidth, sessions, and health metrics streamed via WebSocket.
features.2.title: Subscription & Billing
features.2.desc: Automated renewals, wallets, invoices, and payment gateway integrations.
features.3.title: Customer Self-Service Portal
features.3.desc: Users manage subscriptions, download configs, and submit tickets independently.
features.4.title: Telegram Bot Integration
features.4.desc: Instant admin alerts, customer notifications, and automated messages.
features.5.title: DNS Failover & Load Balancing
features.5.desc: Automatic traffic rerouting when nodes go down — zero manual intervention.
features.6.title: Auto-Updates & Backups
features.6.desc: One-click updates with rollback support and scheduled database backups.
features.7.title: Multi-Language Support
features.7.desc: Built-in English, Farsi, Chinese, and Russian translations with RTL support.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Deploy your VPN service in minutes. Full control, no vendor lock-in.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about KorisPanel.
faq.0.a: KorisPanel supports OpenVPN, WireGuard, IKEv2, L2TP/IPsec, SSH tunneling, Cisco IPSec (VLESS/VMess/Trojan). All protocols are managed from a single dashboard with per-node toggle controls.
faq.1.q: How many users can I manage?
faq.1.a: There is no hard limit on the number of users. KorisPanel is optimized for servers with as little as 1 GB RAM and can comfortably handle thousands of active subscriptions with proper node scaling.
faq.2.a: Basic Linux server familiarity is helpful, but the one-line installer handles setup automatically. The admin dashboard provides a visual interface for all operations — no command-line work required day-to-day.
faq.3.a: Yes. You can try KorisPanel free for 14 days with full feature access. No credit card required — just install on your server and start managing your VPN service immediately.
faq.4.a: KorisPanel includes a built-in billing engine with wallet-based payments, automated renewals, invoice generation, and payment gateway integrations. Customers can top up and manage subscriptions through the self-service portal.
faq.5.q: Can I use my own servers?
faq.5.a: Absolutely. KorisPanel is self-hosted — you deploy it on your own infrastructure. Add as many VPN nodes as you need, anywhere in the world, and manage them all centrally.
faq.6.a: KorisPanel includes a full ticket system with SLA tracking, canned responses, file attachments, and customer satisfaction ratings. You also get Telegram bot integration for instant notifications.
footer.tagline: Self-hosted VPN management for service operators.
